queries.question: Show Spanish-speaking pilots and gate agents.
queries.sql:
SELECT Gate_Agents.name
FROM Gate_Agents
WHERE Gate_Agents.Language = "Spanish"
UNION
SELECT Pilots.name
FROM Pilots
WHERE Pilots.Language = "Spanish"
